overview: Based on the published agenda, the Finance and Human Resources Committee of the Village of Weston was scheduled to meet on July 20, 2026, to review financial reports, personnel matters, and policy amendments. The meeting was set to address budget status updates, audit proposals, and consideration of policy changes related to employee uniforms and conduct standards.

agenda.item: Approval of Minutes from Previous Finance & HR Meeting: June 15, 2026
TIF 1 and TIF 2 Detail Reports for June
Discussion and/or action on Cintas Uniform Agreement

Discussion and/or action on Amendments to Chapter 5 Job Classification & Compensation, Section 13 Clothing and Equipment Allowance and Chapter 10 Behavior & Conduct, Section 01 Appearance of the Employee Personnel Policies and Procedures Handbook
Discussion and/or action on audit proposal
Discussion and/or action on 2025 financial audit report
Discussion and/or action on 2027 Budget process and tentative calendar
Discussion and/or action on referral from Board of Trustees regarding Ethics function as it pertains to Village committees, commissions, and staff

discussions.body: The committee was scheduled to acknowledge the June 2026 financial report for all funds. The report was expected to provide updates on General Fund revenue at 75.1% of budget and expenditures at 47.7% of budget, along with status information on special revenue funds including the Aquatic Center and proprietary funds such as Water, Sewer, and Stormwater.

discussions.item: TIF 1 and TIF 2 Detail Reports for June
discussions.body: The committee was set to review detailed reports for Tax Increment Finance Districts 1 and 2 as part of the regular monthly financial reporting acknowledgment process.
The committee was expected to acknowledge staff transitions that occurred during the first half of 2026 as part of routine human resources reporting.
The committee was scheduled to acknowledge the annual report on exit interviews conducted with departing staff members.

discussions.item: Discussion and/or action on Cintas Uniform Agreement
discussions.body: The committee was set to discuss and potentially take action on the Cintas uniform service agreement. Based on prior meeting minutes, the discussion was expected to address contract terms and alternatives for employee uniform provisions.

discussions.item: Discussion and/or action on Amendments to Chapter 5 Job Classification & Compensation, Section 13 Clothing and Equipment Allowance and Chapter 10 Behavior & Conduct, Section 01 Appearance of the Employee Personnel Policies and Procedures Handbook
discussions.body: The committee was scheduled to discuss and potentially act on proposed amendments to personnel policies regarding clothing allowances and employee appearance standards. The discussion was expected to address options for employee uniform services or reimbursement.

discussions.item: Discussion and/or action on audit proposal
discussions.body: The committee was set to consider and potentially approve an audit proposal for the Village's financial audit services.

discussions.item: Discussion and/or action on 2025 financial audit report
discussions.body: The committee was scheduled to review and potentially take action on the completed 2025 financial audit report for the Village.

discussions.item: Discussion and/or action on 2027 Budget process and tentative calendar
discussions.body: The committee was expected to discuss and establish the process and timeline for developing the Village's 2027 budget.

discussions.item: Discussion and/or action on referral from Board of Trustees regarding Ethics function as it pertains to Village committees, commissions, and staff
discussions.body: The committee was set to address a referral from the Board of Trustees regarding how ethics functions should be implemented and managed across Village committees, commissions, and staff members.

actionItems: Scheduled to vote on approval of previous meeting minutes from June 15, 2026
Expected to acknowledge June 2026 financial reports
Scheduled to discuss and potentially act on Cintas Uniform Agreement
Expected to consider amendments to employee clothing allowance and appearance policies
Scheduled to review and potentially approve audit proposal
Expected to consider 2025 financial audit report
Scheduled to establish 2027 budget process and calendar
Expected to address Board of Trustees referral regarding ethics function
title: Finance and Human Resources Committee - 7/20/2026
